---
name: Feature request
about: A capability or improvement you'd like Forge to have
labels: enhancement
---

## What you want to do

<!-- Describe the workflow or capability you have in mind. -->

## Why it matters

<!-- What problem this solves, what task it unblocks, or who would benefit. -->

## How you've worked around it today

<!-- Optional — the current rough edge tells us how impactful the change would be. -->

## Implementation shape (optional)

<!--
If you have a concrete idea of what this should look like (a new tool, a CLI
flag, a config key, an API surface), describe it here. Skip if you'd rather
leave the design open.
-->

## Note on contributions

<!--
Forge does not currently accept pull requests, but well-formed feature
requests carry a lot of weight in prioritization. If you'd be willing to
help test a prototype once one exists, mention that — it changes how fast
something can land.
-->
